description: Publish a WordPress page titled 'Classical Sessions EP' for an upcoming audio release using the modern Block Editor. The page must feature the album cover (`album_cover.jpg`) from `~/Music/Classical_EP/` followed by three sequential sections for the MP3 tracks in that directory. Each track section must contain a native Audio block and a native Details block. For each Details block, set the summary to 'Track Notes: [Composer Name]' and include the corresponding historical context from `~/Music/Classical_EP/ep_assets.txt` in the expanded content area. Ensure the page is published.
